LOG.name: Operational Log
LOG.description: Timestamped system event log with HMAC chain integrity

ATT.name: Attestation
ATT.description: Cryptographic proof of policy evaluation or identity verification

TST.name: Test Result
TST.description: Validation or qualification test execution output

Tier2.scope: Security events, operational decisions, policy evaluations

Tier3.scope: Routine telemetry, periodic baselines, informational logs

controls.name: 5-Check Envelope Validation
controls.whatIsImplemented: Every agent request passes through a 5-check envelope: identity verification, permission scope, autonomy level, policy compliance, and HMAC integrity.
controls.howOftenValidated: Every request (real-time); audit review quarterly

controls.name: Agent Scope Boundary Enforcement
controls.whatIsImplemented: Runtime enforcement of agent permission boundaries preventing lateral movement or privilege escalation beyond assigned scope.
controls.howOftenValidated: Every request (real-time); penetration test semi-annually

controls.name: Input Sanitization Gate
controls.whatIsImplemented: All agent inputs validated against schema definitions and injection patterns before processing.
controls.howOftenValidated: Every request (real-time); pattern library updated monthly

controls.name: Output Validation Gate
controls.whatIsImplemented: All agent outputs validated for policy compliance, data leakage, and format integrity before delivery to downstream consumers.
controls.howOftenValidated: Every request (real-time); output schema review quarterly

controls.name: 6-Outcome Decision Routing
controls.whatIsImplemented: ATK produces exactly one of 6 outcomes per evaluation: ALLOW, DENY, ESCALATE, QUARANTINE, AUDIT, DEGRADE. Each outcome triggers deterministic downstream action.
controls.howOftenValidated: Every request (real-time); outcome distribution analysis monthly

controls.name: HMAC Chain Integrity
controls.whatIsImplemented: All trust decisions recorded in append-only HMAC-chained ledger preventing retroactive tampering.
controls.howOftenValidated: Continuous (real-time verification); integrity audit quarterly

controls.name: Cross-Domain Trust Propagation
controls.whatIsImplemented: Trust decisions propagated across agent collaboration boundaries with scope attenuation: delegated agents inherit reduced trust ceiling.
controls.howOftenValidated: Every delegation event; trust propagation audit quarterly

controls.name: Trajectory Logging
controls.whatIsImplemented: Complete tool call trajectory captured with caller identity, parameters, return values, and timing for every agent action.
controls.howOftenValidated: Continuous (real-time); log completeness audit monthly

controls.name: Anomaly Detection
controls.whatIsImplemented: Statistical deviation detection on tool call patterns against established behavioral baselines.
controls.howOftenValidated: Continuous (real-time); detection threshold tuning monthly

controls.name: Cross-Layer Anomaly Correlation (CLAS)
controls.whatIsImplemented: 4-layer telemetry correlation engine computing weighted anomaly scores across Network, Prompt, Tool Call, and Data Access layers. CLAS = Σ(w_i × anomaly_score_i).
controls.howOftenValidated: Continuous (3 temporal windows: 60s, 15min, 24h); weight calibration quarterly

controls.name: Behavioral Baseline Registry (BBR)
controls.whatIsImplemented: Per-agent behavioral profiles with 11-field schema tracking tool call, data access, prompt, and network patterns. Deviation thresholds scaled by autonomy level (A1=2.0σ to A4=3.5σ).
controls.howOftenValidated: Baseline update: scheduled (30d), change-triggered, post-incident; full review quarterly

controls.name: Playbook Dispatch Engine
controls.whatIsImplemented: Automated incident response dispatch matching correlation rules (CR-01 to CR-10) to OWASP ASI playbooks (PB-01 to PB-10). 6-phase execution: Detection → Containment → Investigation → Remediation → Recovery → Lessons Learned.
controls.howOftenValidated: Every incident trigger; playbook drill quarterly; full tabletop semi-annually

controls.name: Component Inventory
controls.whatIsImplemented: Complete inventory of all AI components: models, datasets, tools, dependencies with version tracking and provenance chain.
controls.howOftenValidated: On every deployment; full inventory audit quarterly

controls.name: Supply Chain Verification
controls.whatIsImplemented: Cryptographic verification of model and tool provenance. Hash-based integrity checks on all AIBOM components before deployment.
controls.howOftenValidated: Every deployment; supply chain scan monthly

controls.name: Lifecycle State Management
controls.whatIsImplemented: AIBOM components tracked through lifecycle states: Draft → Qualified → Active → Deprecated → Retired with mandatory transition approvals.
controls.howOftenValidated: On every state transition; lifecycle compliance audit quarterly

controls.name: Pre-Execution Approval Gate
controls.whatIsImplemented: Mandatory human approval before execution of actions classified as high-impact or exceeding agent autonomy level.
controls.howOftenValidated: Every gate trigger; gate bypass audit monthly

controls.name: Escalation Routing
controls.whatIsImplemented: Deterministic routing of ESCALATE outcomes to designated human supervisors based on domain, severity, and time-of-day rules.
controls.howOftenValidated: Every escalation event; routing accuracy audit monthly

controls.name: Override Documentation
controls.whatIsImplemented: All human overrides of automated decisions captured with justification, signer identity, and scope of override.
controls.howOftenValidated: Every override event; override pattern analysis quarterly

controls.name: Checkpoint SLA Monitoring
controls.whatIsImplemented: SLA tracking for human response times at checkpoints with automatic DEGRADE fallback if approval timeout exceeded.
controls.howOftenValidated: Continuous (real-time); SLA compliance report weekly

controls.name: Feedback Loop Integration
controls.whatIsImplemented: Human checkpoint decisions feed back into agent behavioral baselines and policy refinement pipeline.
controls.howOftenValidated: Monthly feedback loop review; impact analysis quarterly

controls.name: Policy Evaluation Gate
controls.whatIsImplemented: Every agent action evaluated against OPA/Rego policy bundles before execution. Deny-by-default with explicit allow rules.
controls.howOftenValidated: Every request (real-time); policy coverage audit monthly

controls.name: Policy Version Control
controls.whatIsImplemented: All policy bundles version-controlled with immutable history. Policy changes require dual approval and staged rollout.
controls.howOftenValidated: Every policy change; version integrity audit quarterly

controls.name: Policy Hot-Reload with Rollback
controls.whatIsImplemented: Runtime policy updates without service interruption. Canary deployment with automatic rollback if error rate exceeds threshold within observation window.
controls.howOftenValidated: Every hot-reload event; rollback drill monthly

controls.name: Policy Decision Logging
controls.whatIsImplemented: Every OPA decision logged with input context, matched rules, and final verdict for audit trail reconstruction.
controls.howOftenValidated: Continuous (real-time); decision log completeness audit monthly

controls.name: Autonomy Level Assignment
controls.whatIsImplemented: Each agent assigned an autonomy level (A0-A4) determining its operational freedom, checkpoint requirements, and deviation thresholds.
controls.howOftenValidated: On assignment/change; level appropriateness review quarterly

controls.name: Promotion Gate Evaluation
controls.whatIsImplemented: 5 unified promotion gates (G1 Performance, G2 Security, G3 Business Impact, G4 Clean History, G5 Governance Sign-off) evaluated before any autonomy level increase.
controls.howOftenValidated: Every promotion request; gate criteria review semi-annually

controls.name: Demotion Trigger Automation
controls.whatIsImplemented: Automatic autonomy demotion triggered by: security incident, deviation threshold breach, or failed periodic requalification. Immediate scope reduction enforced.
controls.howOftenValidated: Every demotion event; trigger accuracy review quarterly

controls.name: Cross-Framework Maturity Mapping
controls.whatIsImplemented: ARHIA A0-A4 levels mapped to 6 external maturity models (CSA ATF, NVIDIA, KPMG TACO, McKinsey, Singapore MGF) enabling interoperable maturity reporting.
controls.howOftenValidated: Mapping accuracy review semi-annually; on external framework update

controls.name: Periodic Requalification
controls.whatIsImplemented: All agents undergo periodic requalification against current baselines and policies. Failure triggers automatic demotion.
controls.howOftenValidated: Requalification cycle: A1=90d, A2=60d, A3=30d, A4=14d

controls.name: NHI-Compatible Credential Issuance
controls.whatIsImplemented: Agent credentials issued via NHI-compatible protocol (OAuth 2.0/SAML adapted) with 10-field schema: agentId, abomRef, supervisorId, departmentScope, autonomyLevel, permissionSet, issuedAt, expiresAt, hmacSignature.
controls.howOftenValidated: Every issuance event; credential hygiene audit monthly

controls.name: 4-Layer Composite Identity Chain
controls.whatIsImplemented: Agent identity resolved through 4-layer chain: Agent → Supervisor → Department → Authorization Boundary. Each layer attenuates permissions downward.
controls.howOftenValidated: Every identity resolution; chain integrity audit quarterly

controls.name: Credential Lifecycle Management
controls.whatIsImplemented: 6-phase credential lifecycle: Creation → Rotation → Promotion → Demotion → Suspension → Retirement. Rotation enforced by policy; expired credentials auto-suspended.
controls.howOftenValidated: Every lifecycle event; rotation compliance audit monthly

controls.name: Evidence Envelope Standard
controls.whatIsImplemented: All evidence packaged in JSON-LD envelope with mandatory fields: @context, @type, controlId, agentId, timestamp, payload, hmacChain, retentionTier.
controls.howOftenValidated: Every evidence emission; schema compliance audit monthly

controls.name: Evidence Type Classification
controls.whatIsImplemented: 5 evidence types (LOG, ATT, MET, APR, TST) with distinct schema requirements, validation rules, and retention tier defaults.
controls.howOftenValidated: Type coverage audit quarterly; on new control addition

controls.name: Retention Tier Enforcement
controls.whatIsImplemented: 3-tier retention policy (Tier1=7yr, Tier2=3yr, Tier3=1yr) enforced at storage layer. Tier assignment based on control criticality classification.
controls.howOftenValidated: Retention compliance scan monthly; tier assignment review annually

controls.name: Evidence Completeness Monitoring
controls.whatIsImplemented: Continuous monitoring ensuring 100% of controls produce their declared evidence types. Gap detection triggers compliance alert.
controls.howOftenValidated: Continuous (real-time gap detection); completeness report weekly
